description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the eclipse-temurin:17-jdk-alpine Docker image with a before_script that installs bash, zip (≈3.0) and wget via apk and defines a persistent cache at cache/build keyed as cache-build. Define stages build and test and set variables ARTIFACT_COMPRESSION_LEVEL, CACHE_COMPRESSION_LEVEL, FF_USE_FASTZIP and GIT_DEPTH as specified. Add a hidden .build-oss-job that runs in the build stage, times out after 5 minutes, has no cache, and executes the shell command 'BUILD_TYPE='oss' ./build.sh' only when the pipeline is triggered by a push to the default branch and any of the listed files (LICENSES/**, includes/**, tools/*.jar, tools/*.sh, zip-content/**, CHANGELOG.rst, LICENSE*.rst, build.sh, conf-*.sh) change. Add a build-job in the build stage with a 5‑minute timeout that runs 'BUILD_TYPE='full' ./build.sh', produces artifacts matching output/*.zip* that expire after 15 minutes, and is triggered on pushes to the default branch with the same file changes, as well as on schedule and web pipelines. Add a ping-cache job in the build stage, non‑interruptible, that runs only on scheduled pipelines and executes 'test ! -d './cache/build' || date -u -- '+%s' > ./cache/build/last-ping.dat' to update a timestamp file in the cache.
